tasks.label: Build and Run BufferTest
tasks.command: cd Builds/MacOSX && xcodebuild -project BufferTest.xcodeproj -configuration Debug && open build/Debug/BufferTest.app

tasks.label: Build and Run iOS Simulator
tasks.command: cd Builds/iOS && xcodebuild -project BufferTest.xcodeproj -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator build && DEVICE="iPhone 15" && xcrun simctl boot "$DEVICE" || true && xcrun simctl install "$DEVICE" build/Debug/BufferTest.app && xcrun simctl launch "$DEVICE" com.yourcompany.BufferTest

tasks.label: Build and Run iOS Simulator
tasks.command: cd Builds/iOS && xcodebuild -project BufferTest.xcodeproj -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator build && open -a Simulator && xcrun simctl bootstatus -b || true && xcrun simctl install booted build/Debug/BufferTest.app && xcrun simctl launch booted com.yourcompany.BufferTest

tasks.label: Clean and Build iOS Simulator
tasks.command: cd Builds/iOS && xcodebuild -project BufferTest.xcodeproj -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator clean build

tasks.label: Clean Build and Run iOS Simulator
tasks.command: cd Builds/iOS && xcodebuild -project BufferTest.xcodeproj -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator clean build && open -a Simulator || true && SIMUDID=$(xcrun simctl list devices | awk -F"[()]" '/iPhone/{ if ($4 ~ /Shutdown|Booted/ && $2 ~ /^[A-F0-9-]+$/) {print $2; exit} }'); if [ -z "$SIMUDID" ]; then echo "No simulator UDID found. Listing devices..."; xcrun simctl list devices | cat; exit 1; fi; xcrun simctl boot "$SIMUDID" || true; xcrun simctl bootstatus "$SIMUDID" -b || true; xcrun simctl install "$SIMUDID" build/Debug/BufferTest.app; xcrun simctl launch "$SIMUDID" com.yourcompany.BufferTest | cat
